characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, brown complexion. He has short, curly black hair, a beard, and a mustache.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. She has long, dark, wavy hair.
characters.wardrobe: Maroon top with a patterned, textured front panel.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, brown complexion. He has short dark hair and a neat beard. He has a visible robotic right arm.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैं यहाँ कॉफ़ी पीने आया हूँ [I came here to have coffee.]
Character C says: I came here to have coffee.
Character A says: यह कॉफ़ी बहुत गरम है [This coffee is very hot.]
Character C says: This coffee is very hot.
Character A says: मुझे इस कॉफ़ी का टेस्ट बहुत पसंद आया [I really like the taste of this coffee.]
Character C says: I really like the taste of this coffee.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core feature of the app: real-time translation and speaking practice.
- Hooks the viewer with a split-screen visual of a human and an AI avatar.
- Demonstrates practical, everyday vocabulary.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मैं यहाँ कॉफ़ी पीने आया हूँ (I came here to have coffee.)
I came here to have coffee.
यह कॉफ़ी बहुत गरम है (This coffee is very hot.)
This coffee is very hot.
मुझे इस कॉफ़ी का टेस्ट बहुत पसंद आया (I really like the taste of this coffee.)
I really like the taste of this coffee.

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: अरे, तुम इंग्लिश कहाँ से सीख रहे हो? [Hey, where are you learning English from?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the relatable learner persona.
- Acts as a transition to reveal the brand/solution.
- Builds curiosity about the learning method.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: अरे, तुम इंग्लिश कहाँ से सीख रहे हो? (Hey, where are you learning English from?)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Supernova ऐप के AI ट्यूटर से [From the AI tutor on the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Directly introduces the Supernova brand.
- Highlights the 'AI tutor' feature as the primary learning tool.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Supernova ऐप के AI ट्यूटर से (From the AI tutor on the Supernova app.)

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: मुझे कुछ समझ नहीं आया [I didn't understand anything.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Validates the user's potential confusion about 'AI tutors'.
- Sets up Character A to explain the app's value proposition in simple terms.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: मुझे कुछ समझ नहीं आया (I didn't understand anything.)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: यह एक ऐप है [This is an app.]
Character A says: जहाँ तुम AI ट्यूटर के साथ रोज़ [Where you can daily with the AI tutor]
Character A says: इंग्लिश बोलने की practice कर सकते हो [practice speaking English.]
Character A says: आज के टाइम में [In today's time,]
Character A says: अगर इंग्लिश नहीं आती [if we don't know English,]
Character A says: तो अच्छी जॉब मिलना मुश्किल है [then getting a good job is difficult,]
Character A says: और कॉन्फिडेंस भी कम हो जाता है [and confidence also drops.]
Character A says: ये तो तुम्हें भी पता है ना? [You also know this, right?]
Character B says: हाँ, बिल्कुल [Yes, absolutely.]
Character A says: इसीलिए मैं Supernova पर [That's why I, on Supernova,]
Character A says: AI ट्यूटर के साथ रोज़ 10-15 मिनट practice करता हूँ [practice for 10-15 minutes daily with the AI tutor.]
Character A says: चाहे इंटरव्यू हो या दोस्तों से बात करनी हो [Whether it's an interview or talking to friends,]
Character A says: मेरी इंग्लिश बहुत improve हुई है [my English has improved a lot.]
Character A says: अब डर नहीं लगता [Now I don't feel scared.]
Character A says: मैं confidently इंग्लिश बोल लेता हूँ [I can speak English confidently.]
Character A says: और हाँ, ये बहुत affordable भी है [And yes, it's very affordable too.]
Character A says: एकदम तुम्हारे बजट में [Completely in your budget.]
Character A says: रोज़ practice करो और कॉन्फिडेंट बनो [Practice daily and become confident.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the core brand message: English is essential for jobs and confidence.
- Explains the daily 10-15 minute practice routine with the AI tutor.
- Positions Supernova as a practical, affordable solution for real-world situations like interviews.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
यह एक ऐप है (This is an app.)
जहाँ तुम AI ट्यूटर के साथ रोज़ (Where you can daily with the AI tutor)
इंग्लिश बोलने की practice कर सकते हो (practice speaking English.)
आज के टाइम में (In today's time,)
अगर इंग्लिश नहीं आती (if we don't know English,)
तो अच्छी जॉब मिलना मुश्किल है (then getting a good job is difficult,)
और कॉन्फिडेंस भी कम हो जाता है (and confidence also drops.)
ये तो तुम्हें भी पता है ना? (You also know this, right?)
हाँ, बिल्कुल (Yes, absolutely.)
इसीलिए मैं Supernova पर (That's why I, on Supernova,)
AI ट्यूटर के साथ रोज़ 10-15 मिनट practice करता हूँ (practice for 10-15 minutes daily with the AI tutor.)
चाहे इंटरव्यू हो या दोस्तों से बात करनी हो (Whether it's an interview or talking to friends,)
मेरी इंग्लिश बहुत improve हुई है (my English has improved a lot.)
अब डर नहीं लगता (Now I don't feel scared.)
मैं confidently इंग्लिश बोल लेता हूँ (I can speak English confidently.)
और हाँ, ये बहुत affordable भी है (And yes, it's very affordable too.)
एकदम तुम्हारे बजट में (Completely in your budget.)
रोज़ practice करो और कॉन्फिडेंट बनो (Practice daily and become confident.)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: मुझे भी इंग्लिश सीखनी है [I also want to learn English.]
Character B says: पर ऐसे कोर्सेस [But such courses]
Character B says: बहुत महँगे होते हैं ना? [are very expensive, right?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Addresses a major friction point for the target audience: cost.
- Keeps the dialogue relatable and conversational.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मुझे भी इंग्लिश सीखनी है (I also want to learn English.)
पर ऐसे कोर्सेस (But such courses)
बहुत महँगे होते हैं ना? (are very expensive, right?)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: अरे नहीं, ये बहुत ही पॉकेट-फ्रेंडली है [Oh no, it's very pocket-friendly.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Overcomes the cost objection quickly and reassuringly.
- Uses relatable Hinglish ('pocket-friendly') without locking into specific pricing.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: अरे नहीं, ये बहुत ही पॉकेट-फ्रेंडली है (Oh no, it's very pocket-friendly.)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: अरे वाह! [Oh wow!]
Character B says: ये तो बहुत बढ़िया है [This is really great.]
Character B says: मैं अभी Supernova ऐप [I will right now the Supernova app]
Character B says: डाउनलोड करती हूँ [download.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a clear, enthusiastic Call to Action (CTA).
- Shows the learner taking immediate steps to solve their problem.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
अरे वाह! (Oh wow!)
ये तो बहुत बढ़िया है (This is really great.)
मैं अभी Supernova ऐप (I will right now the Supernova app)
डाउनलोड करती हूँ (download.)
